2182460.name: LIGHTLINK
2182460.description:
Lights. Music. Magic!

Level up your light shows with LIGHTLINK advanced music visualization. Each light show is fully synchronized with millisecond precision to your favorite songs on Spotify. All you have to do is link your RGB lights and push play.

Typical music visualizers use bots or algorithms to create a light show for each song. What you get is a generic, one size fits all light show that doesn't really match the music. LIGHTLINK is different. Each song is programmed by professional lighting designers. With human input, we create a light show as the artist intended.

LIGHTLINK features hundreds of your favorite songs. Each day a new song is posted for you to experience.
Note: Spotify Premium account is required to synchronize light shows to music.

Compatible RGB Lights:
1. Nanoleaf Aurora
2. Nanoleaf Canvas Squares
3. Nanoleaf Shapes
4. Nanoleaf Lines
5. RAZER Chroma enabled devices (Mice, mats, keyboards, headphones, etc.)
6. Fans, Light strips and other addressable RGB devices with the RAZER Addressable RGB Controller
7. Philips Hue
8. Twinkly
9. Corsair iCUE enabled devices.

Download today and bring the concert experience home to your RGB Setup.
